name: [Southern Fjords] Newspaper Day
short_description: In Newspaper Day, you take on the role of a newspaper delivery person in a seemingly quiet neighborhood. Every morning, you carry out your job, delivering the day's news to your neighbors' doors. However, you soon realize that things are not what they seem.
detailed_description:
You will play as David, a teenage boy in school, who has a part-time job as a newspaper delivery boy. You must deliver newspapers to your neighbors, talk to them, and learn more about their lives. However, you will gradually realize that there's something strange about one of them. Therefore, you will need to investigate further, very carefully, using your wits, your job, and the clues to bring the truth to light in a terrifying and dangerous environment.

Features

  • Eerie atmosphere
  • Realistic graphics
  • 40 minutes - 1 hour of gameplay
  • Engaging storyline

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, French, Italian, German, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal
*languages with full audio support
